data.title: Justin Wolfers Says Simply 'Absurd' That Politicians Are Trading Stocks: 'Time For Congress To Fix Itself'
data.description: Australian economist Justin Wolfers came down on Congressional stock trading, calling it "absurd" and a "weird flaw" that needs to be addressed.

data.title: Google Inks Taiwan's First Corporate Geothermal Energy Deal To Power Data Centers
data.description: In a significant step towards its clean energy goals, Google (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) has secured the first corporate power purchase agreements (PPAs) for geothermal energy in Taiwan.

data.title: Amazon's Aggressive Price Cuts Hurt Sephora's US Sales, Says LVMH CFO Cecile Cabanis: 'We Try To Avoid This Technique'
data.description: Amazon's aggressive pricing tactics are putting pressure on Sephora's e-commerce performance in the United States.

data.title: Palantir CEO Alex Karp Credits Contrarian Strategy For 350% Stock Surge: 'If You Sue The US Government...'
data.description: Palantir CEO Alex Karp attributes the company's success to ignoring critics and staying focused on building essential software tools.

data.title: Steve Jobs Was 'Somewhere In The Middle' Of Perfectionist Leader And Unforgiving 'Screaming Lunatic,' Says Marc Andreessen
data.description: Marc Andreessen described Steve Jobs as a demanding yet transformative force with high standards and deep respect for quality.
